TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-taboo_pawan 2021s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: a kesaundaha a mu m msaane ka oda nii.
S.PHON: a kesaundaħa a mu m msaane ka oda nii.
S.FORM: a kesaundaha a mu m msaane ka oda nii.
S.PHON: a kesaundaħa a mu m msaane ka oda nii.
S.TRANSL: 他們所謂的連襟是這樣的.
Here is the story of their so-called brother-in-law relation.

S.FORM: kesaunna msaane nii we a netun mangan mqedil netun mangan mqedil ka rseno ma eniqan swai ma eniqan qbsuran ka ka qedilna.
S.PHON: kesaunna msaane nii we a netun maŋan mqedil netun maŋan mqedil ka ɾseno ma eniqan swai ma eniqan qbsuɾan ka ka qedilna.
S.FORM: kesaunna msaane nii we a netun mangan mqedil netun mangan mqedil ka rseno ma eniqan swai ma eniqan qbsuran ka ka qedilna.
S.PHON: kesaunna msaane nii we a netun maŋan mqedil netun maŋan mqedil ka ɾseno ma eniqan swai ma eniqan qbsuɾan ka ka qedilna.
S.TRANSL: 所謂的連襟關係是指,如果男人娶太太的時候,她有兄弟.
The so-called brother-in-law relation means that if a man marries a woman, she has an elder or younger brother.

S.FORM: kiya naqah riyung so naqah ka so pqitaan nodaan so a so a kndesan kndesan so a so a msuupu ka a dheya ka ane di.
S.PHON: kija naqaħ ɾijuŋ so naqaħ ka so pqitaan nodaan so a so a kndesan kndesan so a so a msuupu ka a dħeja ka ane di.
S.FORM: kiya naqah riyung so naqah ka so pqitaan nodaan so a so a kndesan kndesan so a so a msuupu ka a dheya ka ane di.
S.PHON: kija naqaħ ɾijuŋ so naqaħ ka so pqitaan nodaan so a so a kndesan kndesan so a so a msuupu ka a dħeja ka ane di.
S.TRANSL: 讓舅子看到生活中做的事很不好,像是他們聚在一起的事.
It is very bad to let the brother-in-law see things done in life, such as they being together.

S.FORM: mnetun qitaandaha duwe e sngaya mesa.
S.PHON: mnetun qitaandaħa duwe e sŋaja mesa.
S.FORM: mnetun qitaandaha duwe e sngaya mesa.
S.PHON: mnetun qitaandaħa duwe e sŋaja mesa.
S.TRANSL: 如果碰到他們看到了,這就說是犯了族律的.
If it happens that they see it, this is said to have broken the law.

S.FORM: ma kiya ka a pgayaundaha.
S.PHON: ma kija ka a pgajaundaħa.
S.FORM: ma kiya ka a pgayaundaha.
S.PHON: ma kija ka a pgajaundaħa.
S.TRANSL: 所以他們認為這犯了忌諱.
Therefore they feel it is a taboo.

S.FORM: ma eniqan eniqan duri mnetun so smmalu so sapah.
S.PHON: ma eniqan eniqan duɾi mnetun so smmalu so sapaħ.
S.FORM: ma eniqan eniqan duri mnetun so smmalu so sapah.
S.PHON: ma eniqan eniqan duɾi mnetun so smmalu so sapaħ.
S.TRANSL: 另外,還有像碰到像在蓋房子的情況.
In addition, there are also situations like when building a house.

S.FORM: ma musa baro ka anena ma.
S.PHON: ma musa baɾo ka anena ma.
S.FORM: ma musa baro ka anena ma.
S.PHON: ma musa baɾo ka anena ma.
S.TRANSL: 他的連襟到上面去.
His brother-in-law went up there.

S.FORM: meniq truma ka so a a so ka swai rsenona qedilna.
S.PHON: meniq tɾuma ka so a a so ka swai ɾsenona qedilna.
S.FORM: meniq truma ka so a a so ka swai rsenona qedilna.
S.PHON: meniq tɾuma ka so a a so ka swai ɾsenona qedilna.

TRANSL.notes: 這男人的太太的弟弟在(房子)裡面.

S.TRANSL: 這男人的太太的弟弟在 裡面.

TRANSL.notes: The younger sibling of the man's wife was inside (the house).

S.TRANSL: The younger sibling of the man's wife was inside .

S.FORM: qmita so a qmita so eyu a baro de qitaanna kana so begax duwe.
S.PHON: qmita so a qmita so eju a baɾo de qitaanna kana so begax duwe.
S.FORM: qmita so a qmita so eyu a baro de qitaanna kana so begax duwe.
S.PHON: qmita so a qmita so eju a baɾo de qitaanna kana so begax duwe.
S.TRANSL: 如果他看到他的陰莖甚至睪丸.
If he sees his penis up there and even testicles.

S.FORM: kiya ka a a mesa ma mchaya ka ane du ma kika ini rengo hayan.
S.PHON: kija ka a a mesa ma mʦħaja ka ane du ma kika ini ɾeŋo ħajan.
S.FORM: kiya ka a a mesa ma mchaya ka ane du ma kika ini rengo hayan.
S.PHON: kija ka a a mesa ma mʦħaja ka ane du ma kika ini ɾeŋo ħajan.
S.TRANSL: 他會想:「姊夫怎麼這樣做?」但他在當時先不說出來.
He would say, "Why did brother-in-law do this?" but he did not say at that time.

S.FORM: bobona mesa bobona de a mhedu mhedu a a ga musa baro ma meyah.
S.PHON: bobona mesa bobona de a mħedu mħedu a a ga musa baɾo ma mejaħ.
S.FORM: bobona mesa bobona de a mhedu mhedu a a ga musa baro ma meyah.
S.PHON: bobona mesa bobona de a mħedu mħedu a a ga musa baɾo ma mejaħ.
S.TRANSL: 之後,當他完成上面的工作,又下來.
Later, he finished the work up there and he went down.

S.FORM: meyah ciida de kiya a ma mchaya ane di mesa ka a swai a rseno mqedilna di.
S.PHON: mejaħ ʦiida de kija a ma mʦħaja ane di mesa ka a swai a ɾseno mqedilna di.
S.FORM: meyah ciida de kiya a ma mchaya ane di mesa ka a swai a rseno mqedilna di.
S.PHON: mejaħ ʦiida de kija a ma mʦħaja ane di mesa ka a swai a ɾseno mqedilna di.
S.TRANSL: 他下來的時候,太太的弟弟便說:「他怎麼這樣子?」
The moment he came down, the younger sibling of his wife would say, "Why did he do that?"

S.FORM: ma anaq qbsuranna mqedilna.
S.PHON: ma anaq qbsuɾanna mqedilna.
S.FORM: ma anaq qbsuranna mqedilna.
S.PHON: ma anaq qbsuɾanna mqedilna.
S.TRANSL: 即使是他太太的兄姊也一樣.
Even his wife's older sibilng.

S.FORM: ma kiya ka a kesaunna smgaya kiya di.
S.PHON: ma kija ka a kesaunna smgaja kija di.
S.FORM: ma kiya ka a kesaunna smgaya kiya di.
S.PHON: ma kija ka a kesaunna smgaja kija di.
S.TRANSL: 那個就是會違犯族律的事.
That is something that would break the taboo.

S.FORM: ma ma smgaya duwe en maanu di asi ka asi ka a dmahur ka anena kiya di.
S.PHON: ma ma smgaja duwe en maanu di asi ka asi ka a dmaħuɾ ka anena kija di.
S.FORM: ma ma smgaya duwe en maanu di asi ka asi ka a dmahur ka anena kiya di.
S.PHON: ma ma smgaja duwe en maanu di asi ka asi ka a dmaħuɾ ka anena kija di.
S.TRANSL: 假如連襟犯了禁忌,他就必須補償他的連襟.
If the brother-in-law broke the taboo, he must make atonement to his brother-in-law.

S.FORM: ma menaq dmahur kiya duwe e so sangaldaha rodux a musa hangucandaha pimahandaha sino.
S.PHON: ma menaq dmaħuɾ kija duwe e so saŋaldaħa ɾodux a musa ħaŋuʦandaħa pimaħandaħa sino.
S.FORM: ma menaq dmahur kiya duwe e so sangaldaha rodux a musa hangucandaha pimahandaha sino.
S.PHON: ma menaq dmaħuɾ kija duwe e so saŋaldaħa ɾodux a musa ħaŋuʦandaħa pimaħandaħa sino.

TRANSL.notes: 違反(這項)族律的賠補方式就像是拿雞煮雞、請其他人喝酒.

S.TRANSL: 違反 族律的賠補方式就像是拿雞煮雞、請其他人喝酒.
The atonement for it can be such that they take and cook chickens, and give other people wine to drink.

S.FORM: ma eniqan uri so o so mddidil so anu ka mddidil ka ane duwe a naqah daha riyung kiya duri.
S.PHON: ma eniqan uɾi so o so mddidil so anu ka mddidil ka ane duwe a naqaħ daħa ɾijuŋ kija duɾi.
S.FORM: ma eniqan uri so o so mddidil so anu ka mddidil ka ane duwe a naqah daha riyung kiya duri.
S.PHON: ma eniqan uɾi so o so mddidil so anu ka mddidil ka ane duwe a naqaħ daħa ɾijuŋ kija duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 像是如果連襟有外遇,那樣非常不好.
Like if the brother-in-law commits adultery, that is very bad as well.

S.FORM: ma so kiya so mddidil duwe.
S.PHON: ma so kija so mddidil duwe.
S.FORM: ma so kiya so mddidil duwe.
S.PHON: ma so kija so mddidil duwe.
S.TRANSL: 如果發生婚外情.
If adultery happens.

S.FORM: en kiya anu ka angalandaha a angalandaha babuy denu ma asuwundaha ma kana so alang kika puqiundaha.
S.PHON: en kija anu ka aŋalandaħa a aŋalandaħa babuj denu ma asuwundaħa ma kana so alaŋ kika puqiundaħa.
S.FORM: en kiya anu ka angalandaha a angalandaha babuy denu ma asuwundaha ma kana so alang kika puqiundaha.
S.PHON: en kija anu ka aŋalandaħa a aŋalandaħa babuj denu ma asuwundaħa ma kana so alaŋ kika puqiundaħa.
S.TRANSL: 他們會拿豬隻,並分送豬肉給全部落的人吃.
They would take pigs and give the pork out to the whole tribe.

S.FORM: ma ma ani kari uri mrengo kari duri duwe mrengo so a so a mrengo naqah kari.
S.PHON: ma ma ani kaɾi uɾi mɾeŋo kaɾi duɾi duwe mɾeŋo so a so a mɾeŋo naqaħ kaɾi.
S.FORM: ma ma ani kari uri mrengo kari duri duwe mrengo so a so a mrengo naqah kari.
S.PHON: ma ma ani kaɾi uɾi mɾeŋo kaɾi duɾi duwe mɾeŋo so a so a mɾeŋo naqaħ kaɾi.
S.TRANSL: 即使講話的時候,說不好的話.
Even when talking, when saying bad words.

S.FORM: an mrengo naqah kari duwe.
S.PHON: an mɾeŋo naqaħ kaɾi duwe.
S.FORM: an mrengo naqah kari duwe.
S.PHON: an mɾeŋo naqaħ kaɾi duwe.
S.TRANSL: 說不好的話.
Say bad words.

S.FORM: sqbahangdaha bale ma naqah karina kesaun ma.
S.PHON: sqbaħaŋdaħa bale ma naqaħ kaɾina kesaun ma.
S.FORM: sqbahangdaha bale ma naqah karina kesaun ma.
S.PHON: sqbaħaŋdaħa bale ma naqaħ kaɾina kesaun ma.
S.TRANSL: 他們聽,他的話真的不好.
They hear that his words are bad.

S.FORM: adoku mnetun so kiya mrengo kari naqah duwe kiya a suta anu a srengodaha ma kika.
S.PHON: adoku mnetun so kija mɾeŋo kaɾi naqaħ duwe kija a suta anu a sɾeŋodaħa ma kika.
S.FORM: adoku mnetun so kiya mrengo kari naqah duwe kiya a suta anu a srengodaha ma kika.
S.PHON: adoku mnetun so kija mɾeŋo kaɾi naqaħ duwe kija a suta anu a sɾeŋodaħa ma kika.
S.TRANSL: 由於我說不好的話,部落的人會說三道四.
Because I said something bad, the villagers will gossip about it.

S.FORM: dmahul ka ane denu.
S.PHON: dmaħul ka ane denu.
S.FORM: dmahul ka ane denu.
S.PHON: dmaħul ka ane denu.
S.TRANSL: 連襟會補償.
The brother-in-law will make atonement for it.

S.FORM: a so kiya ka a ndaandaha cbeyo.
S.PHON: a so kija ka a ndaandaħa ʦbejo.
S.FORM: a so kiya ka a ndaandaha cbeyo.
S.PHON: a so kija ka a ndaandaħa ʦbejo.
S.TRANSL: 那就是以前的做法.
That is what is done in the past.
